name: 7" 6pk Plastic Kids' Dinner Plates - Pillowfort™: Toddler Plates, Reusable, Dishwasher & Microwave Safe
description: Add fun to mealtimes with this 6-Pack of Dinner Plates from Pillowfort™. Made from a BPA-free material, these dinner plates feature a classic round shape and they're designed with raised edges for easy scooping to help minimize spills or messes. This pack includes six round dinner plates, each showcasing a vibrant solid hue to add color and interest to mealtimes. Microwave safe for reheating only, you can toss them in the dishwasher for easy cleanup.
